title: stachys germanica var. lusitanica
intro: Stachys germanica var. lusitanica, also known as Wood Betony, is a type of plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to Portugal. It has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cognitive function. The health benefits of Wood Betony include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as a natural pain reliever. Wood Betony can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
